pairings.rationale: Editorial serif gravitas + char-reveal + video background = cinematic luxury. PreloaderScreen primes the user for the editorial experience.
Standard ecommerce funnel. CartDrawer slides over ProductCard grid. CheckoutFlow replaces CartPage on proceed.

conflicts.reason: Serif editorial tone demands elegance. Glitch destroys trust signal. Consistent clash across all luxury contexts.
Lenis overrides native scroll behavior. CSS scroll-snap conflicts — unpredictable momentum.
